data.title: ComEd offers $175,000 in scholarships for college & trades students in energy fields, with awards up to $10,000 each.
data.description: In Chicago, ComEd disclosed that it has launched the application process for its Future of Energy scholarship initiative, offering a total of $175,000 in scholarships. Eligible students interested in a career in the energy sector can now apply for scholarships from $1,000 to $10,000 until November 16, 2025. This program aims to support students pursuing energy-related trades training or STEM majors in college. It provides an opportunity for local students to receive financial assistance for their educational aspirations.

data.title: 35 lawmakers urge Congress to oppose hemp ban in $28.4 billion industry, push for regulations supporting growth.
data.description: In Washington, 35 Members of Congress have come together to send a clear message to leadership, urging them to oppose any measures that could jeopardize the $28.4 billion hemp industry. Spearheaded by Representative James Comer (R-KY), the lawmakers are advocating for the implementation of responsible regulations that prioritize consumer protection and support the growth of this burgeoning American industry. The push comes as the sector faces the looming threat of prohibition, emphasizing the need for proactive steps to safeguard its future.

data.title: Institutions invest $28B in defense tech surge against AI security threats per CNAS report. Vigilance increasing.
data.description: VisionWave Holdings, Inc., based in Vancouver, BC, released a statement on Sept. 26, 2025, regarding a report by the Center for a New American Security (CNAS). The report highlights that institutions are changing their security strategies due to AI-driven threats. Notably, according to the CNAS report, these threats have prompted a reevaluation of security protocols and approaches.

data.title: Fluoropolymer Tubing Market projected value $813.5 million by 2030 - MarketsandMarkets™ report.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, in Delray Beach, Florida, a market report was released detailing the Fluoropolymer Tubing industry. The report covers various materials such as PTFE, FEP, PFA, ETFE, PVDF, and others. It also explores different form factors including Heat Shrink, Single Lumen, Co-extruded, Multi Lumen, Tapered or Bump Tubing, and Braided Tubing. The analysis includes applications and regions globally. This comprehensive study provides insights into the Fluoropolymer Tubing Market, offering valuable information for stakeholders in the industry.

data.title: Mass Flow Controller Market expected to reach US$1.70 billion by 2031 with CAGR of 5.8%. Focus on innovative product development.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, a recent report released by The Insight Partners emphasized the steady expansion of the mass flow controller market. This growth is primarily fueled by rising trends in automation, process control, and the ongoing shift towards digitalization. Additionally, the surge in demand for clean energy, renewable resources, and alternative fuels has significantly contributed to this market growth. The detailed analysis in the report explores these factors and predicts a substantial increase in market size and revenue in the coming years.

data.title: Win free dumplings for life on National Dumpling Day, Sept 26 with MìLà's interactive game. Celebrate and win big!
data.description: A contemporary Chinese cuisine brand is marking National Dumpling Day by introducing an engaging game for an opportunity to win lucrative prizes. Based in Seattle, the brand named MìLà is renowned for delivering high-quality restaurant-style meals to its customers. The latest initiative, known as "MìLà Mania," was unveiled on September 26, 2025, offering participants a chance to win significant rewards.

data.title: PowerSchool's Attendance Intervention wins Tech & Learning Award for secondary education in Back to School 2025.
data.description: In Folsom, California, PowerSchool, a top provider of cloud-based K-12 education software, has proudly revealed that their PowerSchool Attendance Intervention solution has been recognized as a recipient of the Tech & Learning Awards of Excellence: Back to School 2025 in the Secondary Education segment. This esteemed award highlights exceptional products that provide schools with adaptability, cost-effectiveness, and specific solutions to advance innovative and impactful teaching practices. The award acknowledges PowerSchool's dedication to enhancing educational experiences and supporting educational institutions.

data.title: AI is revolutionizing subscriptions & monetization per ISG Buyers Guides. Evaluates software providers & products for subscription management.
data.description: A recent report from ISG Buyers Guides™ in Stamford, Conn., evaluates software providers and products designed for subscription management. The guides analyze tools aimed at facilitating the handling of subscription operations, assisting businesses in managing their subscriptions efficiently. This assessment provides valuable insights for companies seeking suitable solutions for their subscription needs.

data.title: Seuritize grows ACRED Fund to Sei using Wormhole's blockchain tech, boosting access and liquidity for investors.
data.description: Securitize has expanded its Apollo Diversified Credit Fund (ACRED) to the Sei network by utilizing Wormhole's multichain interoperability. This move aims to improve liquidity and increase accessibility for institutional investors. The extension of ACRED to the Sei network enables a broader range of investors to participate in the fund's opportunities. This partnership leverages Wormhole's technology to enhance the functionality of ACRED and provide a seamless experience across different chains. The collaboration is expected to attract a significant number of institutional investors seeking diversified credit options.
